write_files.content:
driftfile /var/lib/chrony/drift
makestep 1.0 3
rtcsync
keyfile /etc/chrony.keys
leapsectz right/UTC
logdir /var/log/chrony
server 172.16.0.254 iburst

127.0.0.1   localhost localhost.localdomain localhost4 localhost4.localdomain4
::1         localhost localhost.localdomain localhost6 localhost6.localdomain6
172.16.0.254	cg-head

passwd:      db files sss systemd
shadow:     db files sss
group:       db files sss systemd
hosts:      files dns myhostname
services:   files sss
netgroup:   sss
automount:  files sss
aliases:    files
ethers:     files
gshadow:    files
networks:   files dns
protocols:  files
publickey:  files
rpc:        files

127.0.0.1   localhost localhost.localdomain localhost4 localhost4.localdomain4
::1         localhost localhost.localdomain localhost6 localhost6.localdomain6
172.16.0.254        cg-head
172.16.0.253        ochami-vm
172.16.0.1 cg01 cg01.localdomain
172.16.0.2 cg02 cg02.localdomain
172.16.0.3 cg03 cg03.localdomain
172.16.0.4 cg04 cg04.localdomain
172.16.0.5 cg05 cg05.localdomain
172.16.0.6 cg06 cg06.localdomain
172.16.0.7 cg07 cg07.localdomain
172.16.0.8 cg08 cg08.localdomain
172.16.0.9 cg09 cg09.localdomain
172.16.0.10 cg10 cg10.localdomain
